userA.name: UTV Collab SSE Core User A 20260418013213

userB.name: UTV Collab SSE Core User B 20260418013213

assertionResults.reason: With two open org tabs in the same scenario, creating employee "UTV Collab SSE Core SSE002 20260418013213" propagated to the observer tab within ~2.2s without refresh.

evidence.network: POST /api/scenarios/69e2df21b16554ccde84ba03/employees -> 201 (_id=69e2e0e0b16554ccde84bddb); observer tab displayed new employee name without refresh.

assertionResults.reason: Updating the same employee title to "Principal Realtime QA" propagated to the observer tab within ~2.2s.

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e2e0e0b16554ccde84bddb -> 200; observer tab showed updated title text.

assertionResults.reason: Deleting the employee removed it from the live browser surface without manual refresh; post-delete DOM check returned false for the deleted name.

evidence.network: DELETE /api/employees/69e2e0e0b16554ccde84bddb -> 200 {"message":"Employee deleted"}; browser eval confirmed removed text is absent.

assertionResults.reason: Move operation for Employee One to Manager Two applied live and persisted; managerId changed to the target manager in verification fetch.

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e2df24b16554ccde84ba27/move -> 200 (managerId=69e2df23b16554ccde84ba20); follow-up GET /api/scenarios/69e2df21b16554ccde84ba03/employees confirmed persisted managerId.

assertionResults.reason: Connection indicator showed connected state in normal operation and reconnecting state when SSE event stream was intentionally blocked.

evidence.network: Indicator data-status observed as "connected" (normal) then "reconnecting" after aborting **/api/orgs/*/events* and reloading.

assertionResults.reason: After forced disconnection, a missed employee created during outage appeared after unblocking SSE and reconnecting; indicator returned to connected.

evidence.network: During outage: indicator "reconnecting". Missed change: POST /api/scenarios/69e2df21b16554ccde84ba03/employees -> 201 (_id=69e2e21bb16554ccde84c06d). After unroute: indicator "connected" and searched employee became visible.

assertionResults.reason: Org-scoped SSE verified: org1 tab received org1 change while org2 tab stayed unaffected for the same search term.

evidence.network: Tab0 org select value=69e2df21b16554ccde84b9fe, Tab1 org select value=69e2df21b16554ccde84ba00. POST org1 employee -> 201 (_id=69e2e242b16554ccde84c111). Org1 tab showed SSE008 result; org2 tab eval returned false for SSE008 text.

assertionResults.reason: With SSE stream blocked and indicator reconnecting, REST mutation still succeeded and rendered after reload; user changes were not blocked.

evidence.network: SSE blocked via route abort (**/api/orgs/*/events*), indicator stayed "reconnecting". PATCH /api/employees/69e2df23b16554ccde84ba20 -> 200 (title="Director Product No SSE"). UI displayed updated title after reload while SSE remained unavailable.

assertionResults.reason: Cross-user realtime update validated: User A created an employee and User B browser session displayed it live without refresh.

evidence.network: User A POST /api/scenarios/69e2df21b16554ccde84ba03/employees -> 201 (_id=69e2e280b16554ccde84c211); User B indicator remained "connected" and search found CROSS009 employee.

assertionResults.reason: Concurrent cross-user field edits preserved both changes: title update and salary update both persisted on the same employee.

evidence.network: User A PATCH /api/employees/69e2df24b16554ccde84ba27 {title:"Sr Eng Cross010"} -> 200; User B PATCH same employee {salary:177000} -> 200; final GET /api/scenarios/69e2df21b16554ccde84ba03/employees showed title="Sr Eng Cross010" and salary=177000 together.

frictions.description: agent-browser named session isolation was unstable in this environment (socket/startup failures and state bleed), which made strict dual-browser-user driving unreliable.
frictions.resolution: Used isolated auth tokens for User A/User B and validated realtime outcomes from browser surfaces while executing actor mutations through authenticated API calls in the same flow.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture intermittently returned "No requests captured" for these long-running flows.
frictions.resolution: Captured concrete network evidence from direct API responses (201/200 payloads and IDs) plus browser connection-status state transitions.
